summary: Tightened the opening to carry forward Chapter 3's final car-round beat and mews-arch spatial anchor. The Chapter 5 handoff already aligned cleanly through the lie beat, so the exit was left intact.
edits: Reframed the first paragraph around Beni already having the Mercedes under the mews arch when Nina comes down.
Kept the existing end-of-chapter lie sequence unchanged because it already hands off directly into Chapter 5.
Checked the style bible for calibration-only example lines; none appeared verbatim in the chapter.
